title: eragrostis multiflora var. biformis
intro: Eragrostis multiflora var. biformis, also known as Bunch Grass or Two-Form Bunch Grass, is a perennial grass species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The medicinal properties of Eragrostis multiflora var. biformis have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems and skin irritations, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory symptoms. Eragrostis multiflora var. biformis can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
